---
name: Feature request
about: General improvements or new capabilities (use the awareness-primitive template for new perception modules)
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The change you'd like

A clear, concise description of what you want.

## Why

What does this unlock? Who benefits?

## Approach (optional)

If you have an implementation in mind, sketch it here.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways this could be done, and why you prefer this one.
